only_in_doc1.text: Either party may terminate this Agreement at any time, without cause, by providing the other party with at least 30 days prior written notice of such termination.
only_in_doc1.closest_match: In the event of any dispute arising under this Agreement, the parties shall first attempt to resolve the matter through binding arbitration administered by the American Arbitration Association.
